context: Agent must correct markdownlint violations in a contributed guide.md file without adding suppressions or changing content meaning.

checklist.name: heading_levels_sequential
checklist.description: Heading levels are sequential with no skips: H1 is followed by H2, H2 by H3, etc. No H1→H3 or H2→H4 skip.

checklist.name: code_blocks_language_tags
checklist.description: All fenced code blocks have explicit language tags (e.g., bash, yaml). No untagged fences remain.

checklist.name: list_markers_consistent
checklist.description: All bullet list items use the same marker character. No mixing of -, *, and +.

checklist.name: no_lint_suppressions
checklist.description: No markdownlint disable comments or suppressions added to the output.

checklist.name: content_preserved
checklist.description: All original sections, code samples, and table content are preserved. No text deleted or reworded.
